productDisplayName: Nike Men's T-Lite 9 Leat Black Shoe
description: The nike T-Lite 9 shoes is a great combination of support and durability. These training shoes offer all-around support, cushioning and durability to meet the demands of core performance. You can also team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Perforations on the toe box, sides and heel counter for breathability Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Appliqued swoosh logo on the side to create a style statement Midsole Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Outsole Phylite and solid rubber outsole for excellent traction on a variety of surfaces Flex grooves for flexibility and natural movement of the feet Wash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
